title: Another Contraction In Coal Indias Production
section_path: Another Contraction In Coal Indias Production
section_path_text: Another Contraction In Coal Indias Production
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
Coal India (which is responsible for over 75% of India's coal output) produced approximately 56.4 million tons of coal last month. This is up month-on-month by 7.4 million tons (15%) but is down year-on-year by 6.1 million tons (-10%). Coal India's output has now contracted on a year-on-year basis during eight of the last ten months.
